_comment: Per-task provider+model routing. Copy to config/bindings.json and edit. Each AI task is bound independently — rebind one task without touching others. Model names are config, not constants. Text tasks default to local Ollama (qwen2.5); rebind any single task to a cloud provider (anthropic/google/openai) by editing its line. 'image' is an ignored Tier 4 stub (Ollama can't generate images).
